Controls hint 'Use [WASDQE] to move; click to shoot!' — confirms Q and E are ABILITY keys (2 ability slots). Player line 'starforce only for 8/8 char' CONFIRMS 'Starforce' is endgame content GATED to 8/8 (fully stat-maxed) characters (ties to the Starforce Nodestones built in D2). Event-boss feed narrated by '<Orc>'.
uncertain: The lava/fire-brick dungeon's NAME was not printed in the captured chat/entries (could be Abyss of Demons or a ROTF fire dungeon). Boss attacks/drops not isolated. Cookie Monster only confirmed as a spawn announcement (no fight/taunt captured).
confidence: HIGH for: Cookie Monster being a real event boss, the Starforce-8/8 gating, client version X1.8.1, WASDQE controls, and the Oryx taunt (verbatim). LOW for the lava dungeon's identity.
